3223220.name: Epoch
3223220.description: This game is a vibrant color puzzle game. On the home screen, you will find a grid filled with colorful blocks, each representing a different element. The gameplay is simple and intuitive: simply move colored blocks to align three or more blocks of the same color, make them disappear, and earn points. As the game progresses, there are more and more challenges, keeping players in an excited and challenging state. The visual effect is bright and fresh, and the sound effect is light and cheerful. Every time the building blocks are successfully matched, it brings a huge sense of satisfaction.
